race.comment: THINK I WILL (14) is a typical Waterhouse/Bott staying prospect. Has led from go to whoa at his last two starts, most recently here at this distance three weeks ago. Still gets in okay after Roper's claim and will be a tough bunny to catch again. ALLEGRO MISS (10) appreciated the drop in grade when a narrow winner over 1850m at Newcastle last time out. Goes well here at today's journey. Just needs luck slotting in from a wide gate to be in the finish. SKYCATCHER (4) wasn't disgraced in Saturday company last start at the third run of the campaign. Rock hard fit and good enough to test this field. TRAPALANDA (6) returned in good order last time when heavily supported. No surprise if he went one better. KAPAKIRI (3) failed to fire when fresh from a spell last time out at Rosehill. Goes better second-up and a drop in grade helps.
